# EasyMDE (vendored)

- Version: 2.20.0
- Upstream: https://github.com/Ionaru/easy-markdown-editor
- License: MIT (see LICENSE)
- Pinned for offline-first install (Diecast ships without CDN dependency).

## Update procedure

1. Bump version above.
2. Re-run the download commands in `docs/execution/diecast-open-source/phase-3b/sp4b_easymde_vendor/plan.md` step 1.
3. Run the visual smoke from sp4b verification.
4. Commit.
